description: Tests serialisation of a deeply nested map -> slice -> pointer -> struct composition.

assertions.description: The type alias 'UserGroups' should resolve to the complex underlying type.
The 'Groups' field (using the alias) should have the correct resolved TypeString.
The 'GroupsInline' field should also have the correct TypeString.
The PackagePath for the field should point to the 'models' package (from the pointer element).
